criteria.requirement: current version never reclaimed regardless of refcount
criteria.test: TestCompactor (explicit sub-case: RunCompaction after closing the held snapshot, when v4's own epoch refcount is 0, still retains v4)

criteria.requirement: version deleted only once its epoch's refcount is zero and not current
criteria.test: TestCompactor (v1, v2 deleted while v3 held open by a live Snapshot; v3 retained until its supersession epoch's refcount drops)

criteria.requirement: EpochManager wired into Snapshot (Acquire on create, Release on Close)
criteria.test: TestSnapshotRead / TestSnapshotReadNoVersionCommitted / TestConcurrentReadersWriters updated call sites all pass with -race; new Snapshot.Close() exercised directly in TestCompactor

criteria.requirement: EpochManager wired into CommitVersion (AdvanceEpoch after successful CAS)
criteria.test: TestCompactor's version->epoch trace depends on AdvanceEpoch being called exactly once per successful commit; full package -race run confirms no regression in existing commit tests
